title: Upgrading Templates
description: Adds the item Upgrading Template and some recipes
body:
# What does this mod add?
This mod adds the item Upgrading Template and some recipes that allows you to use less resources when upgrading your Tools/Armor 
### For example:
- Iron Tools/Armors to Golden Tools/Armors recipe.
- Smithing Template recipe that is made with a Diamond And an Upgrading Template

# Recipes

## Template recipes
<details>
<summary>Upgrading Template recipe</summary>
  
![Upgrading Template Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35f7a0e8e7e34d0c5b53127606ce76d81cf754e6.png)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Smithing Template recipe</summary>

![Smithing Template recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e59781e46757212c5287df941d7739dc027e2efe.png)
</details>

## Tools/Armors recipes

You can upgrade tool to a higher version by putting the items in the order shown in the picture:

![iron sword to golden sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2f824871f6f5536b1024f696d9096718b7943ff.png)

Things that you can put in the slots in the Smithing Table to upgrade your tool using the Upgrading Template:

<details>
<summary>Left slot</summary>
Upgrading Template, as this is the required item to upgrade your tools.
</details>


<details>
<summary>Middle slot</summary>
  
### The tool that you want to upgrade.

Theese can be any vanilla Iron Tool/Armor or any vanilla Golden Tool/Armor.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Right slot</summary>
  
### The tier's ingot that you want to upgrade to.
  
Theese can be Gold Ingot or Diamond


</details>

# Requirements

[![Requires Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-Fabric_API-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
